    '[{"id":"A","text":"It’s important for individuals to understand that they can help to stop the spread of the virus by following simple guidelines, such as washing their hands frequently and avoiding close contact with people who are sick; however, they can help to stop the spread of the virus by following simple guidelines, such as washing their hands frequently and avoiding close contact with people who are sick.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"It’s important for individuals to understand that they can help to stop the spread of the virus by following simple guidelines, such as washing their hands frequently and avoiding close contact with people who are sick, although they can help to stop the spread of the virus by following simple guidelines, such as washing their hands frequently and avoiding close contact with people who are sick.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"It’s important for individuals to understand that they can help to stop the spread of the virus by following simple guidelines, such as washing their hands frequently and avoiding close contact with people who are sick, since they can help to stop the spread of the virus by following simple guidelines, such as washing their hands frequently and avoiding close contact with people who are sick.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"It’s important for individuals to understand that they can help to stop the spread of the virus by following simple guidelines, such as washing their hands frequently and avoiding close contact with people who are sick; because they can help to stop the spread of the virus by following simple guidelines, such as washing their hands frequently and avoiding close contact with people who are sick.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,

    '[{"id":"A","text":"The young poet, whose work was inspired by the natural world, often wrote about the beauty of the trees, the sound of the wind, and the feel of the sun on his skin: the poet''s poems were known for their vivid imagery and emotional depth.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"B","text":"The young poet, whose work was inspired by the natural world, often wrote about the beauty of the trees, the sound of the wind, and the feel of the sun on his skin, the poet''s poems were known for their vivid imagery and emotional depth.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""},{"id":"C","text":"The young poet, whose work was inspired by the natural world, often wrote about the beauty of the trees, the sound of the wind, and the feel of the sun on his skin; the poet''s poems were known for their vivid imagery and emotional depth.","is_correct":true,"explanation":""},{"id":"D","text":"The young poet, whose work was inspired by the natural world, often wrote about the beauty of the trees, the sound of the wind, and the feel of the sun on his skin the poet''s poems were known for their vivid imagery and emotional depth.","is_correct":false,"explanation":""}]'::jsonb,

    'In her book, *The Second Sex,* Simone de Beauvoir makes the point that women are often defined by their relationship to men. Beauvoir argues that this way of thinking about women is a product of patriarchy, which she defines as a system of power in which men have more social and political power than women. Beauvoir’s main claim in *The Second Sex* is that the way women are defined in society is a problem because it prevents women from fully achieving their potential.',
